# unifi_wans (Data Source)

All WANs configured on the site. Use it to resolve a WAN's UUID for other resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List configured WANs, e.g. to resolve a WAN's UUID for other resources.
data "unifi_wans" "all" {}

output "wans_by_name" {
  value = { for w in data.unifi_wans.all.wans : w.name => w.id }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `wans` (Attributes List) The configured WANs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--wans))

<a id="nestedatt--wans"></a>
### Nested Schema for `wans`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) WAN UUID.
- `name` (String) WAN name.
